sql: WITH t AS (SELECT lead_wallet AS w, net_sol AS net, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY lead_wallet ORDER BY entry_ts) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY lead_wallet) AS c FROM copy_trades WHERE strategy_id='copy-tp100-sl30' AND status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL AND lead_wallet IS NOT NULL) SELECT w, c AS n, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN rn<=c/2 THEN net ELSE 0 END),3) AS first_net, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN rn>c/2 THEN net ELSE 0 END),3) AS second_net FROM t GROUP BY w HAVING c>=12 ORDER BY first_net DESC
